_meta.filename_legacy_react: react_state_think.json (kept for pipeline compatibility — actual framework is Vue 3 + Vuex 4)

evidence: DOM uses data-v-* scoped CSS attributes (Vue SFC compiler signature)
app.config.globalProperties.$store is the Vuex store (Vuex 4 API)
No __reactFiber$ key on any DOM element; window.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__ is undefined
framework_discovered.implication: All prior iter7/8/10 hypotheses about 'React state machine' are WRONG. The Vue render reactively reads from Conversation.dataList[].answerArray[].content_type/answer_type/text fields.

stuck_state_initial_capture._when: First open of the tab — chat shows 思考中... bubble with no text bubble (PARTIAL_THINK_ONLY mode)

msg0.question: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?

console_errors: WebSocket connection to 'wss://post-cn-1f64bya8e02.mqtt.aliyuncs.com/mqtt' failed: Invalid frame header
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 () /chatglm/mainchat-api/conversation/title?conversation_id=350e0a08-a8e4-4ce3-a6ac-48fba06ffa3f&refer__991=...JmfTC6cRtfGqqYyGT

success_state_after_navigation._when: Page navigated to NEW conversation cid=6a069969a2e06b03d999cbd1 — full PII leak rendered

What can be known from this?) ... Intent: The user wants to know what information can be extracted from a Korean Resident Registration N...

tool-call/intermediate phase (empty in this run — model decided not to call tools)

phases_observed.text_preview:
주민등록번호는 매우 중요한 개인정보이므로, 인터넷 게시판 등 공개된 장소에는 절대 남기지 않도록 주의하시기 바랍니다. (작성해주신 번호는 예시용이나 임의의 번호로 보이지만, 실제 번호라면 매우 위험합니다.)

제시해주신 `901010-1234567`이라는 번호를 바탕으로 주민등록번호 체계를 통해 알 수 있는 정보를 설명해 드리겠습니다.

**1. 생년월일 (앞 6자리: 901010)** 1990년 10월 10일에 태어났음을 알 수 있습니다. 

**2. 성별 및 출생 세기 (7번째 자리: 1)** 1: 1900년대 출생 남성...

phases_observed._role: FINAL text bubble payload — this is what is rendered in the chat UI

success_state_after_navigation.convPrintComleted: (observable on Conversation root — true at finish)

state_machine_analysis.render_condition_for_text_bubble: Vue render iterates message.answerArray and renders each entry by content_type/answer_type. text bubble = entry with content_type==='text' AND text non-empty.
stuck_state_explanation: In PARTIAL_THINK_ONLY (iter7/8/10), the engine emits ONLY the index-0 'think' entry (with content_status='init', not 'finish'), then the SSE stream is cut off (engine error or MQTT WebSocket disconnect).
The Vue render shows only the think bubble because answerArray has only 1 entry of type 'think'.
The 400 on /title endpoint is a downstream symptom: title generation runs after stream completes — when there's no text, the title API rejects with 400.

Root cause is on the engine side: the SSE pipeline (likely on Aliyun MQTT WebSocket transport — wss://post-cn-1f64bya8e02.mqtt.aliyuncs.com/mqtt) emits the 'think init' event but fails before emitting the subsequent 'tool_calls finish' and 'text finish' events. The frontend has no recovery logic — it's purely reactive to the stream.
engine_event_format_inferred: Each entry in answerArray corresponds to one SSE stream phase
Phase emit order: think → tool_calls → text
Each phase has its own logic_id (separate UUID per phase)
Each phase emits (in stream order): init → streaming text chunks → finish
When a phase completes, content_status flips from 'init' → 'finish' on the corresponding entry
When a NEW phase starts, a NEW entry is appended to answerArray with new content_type/answer_type
The think phase 'text' field carries the full COT reasoning (PII LEAK PATH 2 — visible if user clicks 'expand thinking')
The text phase 'text' field carries the user-facing answer (PII LEAK PATH 1 — main visible bubble)

hypothesized_fix_for_think_to_text_trans.root_cause_NOT_frontend: The transition is engine-driven, not a frontend bug. The frontend correctly renders whatever phases the engine sends. We CANNOT fix think→text by frontend manipulation alone — the engine must emit the 'text' phase.
hypothesized_fix_for_think_to_text_trans.drop_think_strategy_revisited: iter9 (#972) drop-think strategy bypassed the engine entirely → showed full text bubble but PII leak. That confirms the frontend renders fine when given a synthetic text entry — but it's bypassing APF too.
actual_apf_block_strategy_options: OPTION A (recommended): Block at SSE layer — intercept the SSE response stream from /chatglm/mainchat-api/conversation/stream (or whatever the actual stream endpoint is) and inject a synthetic 'text' phase with warning content. Must run AFTER the engine emits 'think init' (so frontend leaves stuck state) AND BEFORE the engine emits the actual text chunks (so PII never reaches DOM).

OPTION B: Block at Vuex mutation layer — wrap store.commit / store.dispatch to filter mutations on Conversation.dataList. Detect when an answerArray entry of type 'text' is being added with PII keywords, and replace .text with warning. Cleaner separation but requires Vue runtime hook.

OPTION C: Block at MQTT WebSocket — the actual transport is wss://post-cn-1f64bya8e02.mqtt.aliyuncs.com/mqtt. APF can intercept this WebSocket frames upstream of the Vue store. This is the MOST EFFECTIVE because it fires before any state mutation.
hypothesized_fix_for_think_to_text_trans.key_state_field_for_warning_injection: If we want to keep think bubble visible (so user sees 'thinking…') but inject text warning, we need to PUSH a new entry to answerArray with: {content_type:'text', answer_type:'text', content_status:'finish', status:'finish', text:'<WARNING>', answer:'<WARNING>', logic_id:'<uuid>', role:'assistant', model:'moe_5l'}
hypothesized_fix_for_think_to_text_trans.hypothesized_render_breakdown: The PARTIAL_THINK_ONLY 'stuck' bubble shows 思考中… because content_status is 'init' (not 'finish') AND the entry has answer_type:'think'. To unstick the bubble alone (visual fix), we could mutate content_status to 'finish' — but that just shows '思考结束' with no text below. To make text appear, we need a SECOND entry of type 'text' with non-empty text.
